news-global-econ.title: MARY KATHARINE HAM: Republicans have a huge MAHA opportunity in 2026 — if they don’t blow it
news-global-econ.description: The MAHA movement gives Republicans a chance to win suburban moms in 2026 midterms by focusing on food quality, screen time and health transparency.

news-global-econ.description: Two men allegedly attempted a terrorist attack in NYC, and Mayor Zohran Mamdani's response raises questions about the city's public safety future.

news-global-econ.title: Trump pushes shaky deal with Iran as Hormuz is shut again, but opponents give him no credit for progress
news-global-econ.description: Despite President Trump striking a ceasefire with Iran and pressuring Israel to halt Lebanon attacks, opponents and media still refuse to give him any credit.

news-global-econ.description: Fox News host Mark Levin explores the concept of 'just war' across faiths on 'Life, Liberty & Levin.'
